lymph_node_category.description: acceptable value for lymph node categories in thyroid cancer. If not included in these standard lymph node 'station' number, should be classified as others.
lymph_node_category.title: Lymph Node Category

lymph_node_side.description: acceptable value for lymph node side in cervical cancer. If not included in these standard sides, should be classified as None.
lymph_node_side.title: Lymph Node Side

station_name.description: specify the name of the lymph node station here.
station_name.title: Station Name

distance.description: If margin is involved, return 0. If margin is uninvolved/free, try your best to find the distance at both microscopic and macroscopic(gross) description, and specify the distance from tumor to margin in mm, rounded to integer. If the margin is uninvolved/free and, after your best effort, the distance is still not specified, return null
distance.title: Distance

margin_category.description: acceptable value for surgical margins in thyroid cancer. If not included in these standard margins, should be classified as others.
margin_category.title: Margin Category

description: Canonical extracted case record for thyroid cancer. Built dynamically from the DSPy signatures listed in models.modellist.organmodels['thyroid'].

ajcc_version.description: identify the ajcc version of the pathological staging
ajcc_version.title: Ajcc Version

distant_metastasis.description: check whether or not distant metastasis is present
distant_metastasis.title: Distant Metastasis

extranodal_extension.description: check whether or not extranodal extension is present; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
extranodal_extension.title: Extranodal Extension

extrathyroid_extension.description: identify if clinically extrathyroid extension is present, only four categories are allowed, if none specified, return None
extrathyroid_extension.title: Extrathyroid Extension

histology.description: identify the histological type of the cancer. e.g. papillary thyroid carcinoma
histology.title: Histology

lymphovascular_invasion.description: check whether or not lymphovascular invasion is present
lymphovascular_invasion.title: Lymphovascular Invasion

margins.description: return all of the possible involved margins and its distance from cancer. example:[ {"margin_category": "anterior_outmost", "margin_involved": false, "distance": 10}, {"margin_category": "isthmus", "margin_involved": false, "distance": null}]. If not present, just output null for every margin
margins.title: Margins

maximal_ln_size.description: check the maximal size of node metastatic tumor in mm, rounded to integer; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
maximal_ln_size.title: Maximal Ln Size

mitotic_activity.description: identify the mitotic activity of the tumor, in mitoses per 10 high power fields. if not specified, return null
mitotic_activity.title: Mitotic Activity

overall_stage.description: identify the overall stage of the tumor
overall_stage.title: Overall Stage

perineural_invasion.description: check whether or not perineural invasion is present
perineural_invasion.title: Perineural Invasion

pm_category.description: identify the pm category of the tumor. if you see cM0 or cM1, etc., code as mx, since pathological M category is not available
pm_category.title: Pm Category

pn_category.description: identify the pn category of the tumor
pn_category.title: Pn Category

predisposing_condition.description: identify any predisposing condition mentioned in the report, such as "Hashimoto thyroiditis" or "radiation exposure". If none mentioned, return None
predisposing_condition.title: Predisposing Condition

procedure.description: identify which surgery procedure was used. e.g. partial thyroidectomy
procedure.title: Procedure

pt_category.description: identify the pt category of the tumor
pt_category.title: Pt Category

regional_lymph_node.description: return all of the involved regional lymph node. example:[{"lymph_node_side": "left", "lymph_node_category": "level_vi_central", "involved": 2, "examined": 5, "station_name": "station 6"}, {"lymph_node_side": "right", "lymph_node_category": "level_ii", "involved": 0, "examined": 3, "station_name": "station 6"}, ...]. If not present, just output null for every lymph node
regional_lymph_node.title: Regional Lymph Node

tnm_descriptor.description: identify the tnm descriptor of the tumor. e.g., "y" (post-therapy), "r", etc.
tnm_descriptor.title: Tnm Descriptor

treatment_effect.description: check the treatment effect of the cancer. If you see "No known presurgical therapy", return None
treatment_effect.title: Treatment Effect

tumor_focality.description: identify whether the tumor is unifocal or multifocal. If not specified, return not_specified
tumor_focality.title: Tumor Focality

tumor_necrosis.description: check whether or not tumor necrosis is present
tumor_necrosis.title: Tumor Necrosis

tumor_site.description: identify the primary site of cancer. e.g. right lobe of thyroid
tumor_site.title: Tumor Site

tumor_size.description: identify the size of the tumor in mm, rounded, if multiple tumors are present, please provide the size of the largest tumor
tumor_size.title: Tumor Size

title: ThyroidCancerCase
